title: gymnogramma calomelanos f. tartarea
intro: Gymnogramma calomelanos f. tartarea is a variety of the Gymnogramma calomelanos plant, a type of fern native to tropical Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Gymnogramma calomelanos f. tartarea include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as relieving fever and pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, and extracts to harness its medicinal properties.
